feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Emergence of Non-Hermitian Magic Angles and Topological Phase Transitions in Twisted Bilayer $\alpha $-$ T_3 $ Lattices
entry.content:
Authors: S Gandhi, G Paul, S Lahiri, S Basu -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.29779, 2026

Abstract: ... This results in the emergence of nearly isolated, extremely flat bands that persist throughout the moiré Brillouin zone (mBZ) [5]. In these flattened ... III, we discuss the emergence of three distinct NHMAs and analyze the flat-band conditions across the ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence WebVoyager: Toward Consistent and Transparent Evaluation of (Web) Agents in The Wild
entry.content:
Authors: D Akkil, M Allaham, A Raj, T Abuelsaad, R Kokku -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.29020, 2026

Abstract: ... To address these challenges, we introduce Emergence WebVoyager1, an enhanced version of the WebVoyager benchmark that standardizes evaluation methodology through clear guidelines for task instantiation, failure handling ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: The Evolving Faber-Jackson Relation: A Unifying Framework for Galaxy Ages and the Baryonic Tully-Fisher Connection
entry.content:
Authors: S Marongwe, S Kauffman - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.29210, 2026

Abstract: The baryonic Tully-Fisher relation (BTFR) and Faber-Jackson relation (FJR) represent fundamental scaling laws linking the baryonic mass of galaxies to their kinematics, yet their physical origin and apparent offsets between different galaxy ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Complexity

entry.content:
Authors: NLA Tuan, TTH Binh, PT Tai, NK Vuong

Abstract: ... Bằng chứng cho prebiotic và synbiotic yếu hơn; trong đó PHGG là prebiotic có tín hiệu thuận lợi hơn đối với đầy hơi, còn các prebiotic dễ sinh hơi cần được sử dụng rất thận trọng. Do vậy, probiotic hoặc prebiotic không nên được áp dụng thường quy ...

entry.title: Life as a Filtered Outcome: Filtered Configuration Framework

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: AA Nekludoff

Journal: 2026

Abstract: This paper introduces the Filtered Configuration Framework (FCF), a formal account of how observable structures arise from a broader space of possible configurations. The framework challenges a common assumption in discussions of abiogenesis ...
